page.title: Your network under automatic control
page.subtitle: Connect your MikroTik routers to automatically activate, suspend, or reconnect services based on the client payment status.

directApi.title: Direct API connection
directApi.description: Link your MikroTik via API. PayNetLink communicates directly with your routers without intermediaries.

autoActivation.title: Automatic activation
autoActivation.description: When a client pays, their service activates automatically. No manual intervention required.

suspensionOnDefault.title: Suspension on default
suspensionOnDefault.description: When the payment deadline expires, the service suspends automatically. Immediate reconnection on payment.

realTimeMonitoring.title: Real-time monitoring
realTimeMonitoring.description: View the status of each router, connected clients, and bandwidth consumption in real time.
